marketersPage.heroSubtitle: Earn commissions on every client you bring — no fixed salary, no limits
marketersPage.benefitInstantCommissionDesc: Get your commission with every successful deal — direct transfer to your account
marketersPage.benefitProToolsDesc: Complete tracking system, smart links, and ready marketing templates
marketersPage.benefitSupportDesc: Dedicated support team to help you succeed with weekly training
marketersPage.benefitTransparencyDesc: Track all your commissions and results in real-time from your dashboard
marketersPage.step1Desc: Create your free account in less than a minute
marketersPage.step2Desc: Spread your referral link across your network
marketersPage.step3Desc: Get a commission with every successful subscription
marketersPage.testimonial1Text: I started with Dealix as an experiment and it became my main income. The system is easy and commissions are instant — best marketing program I've used.
marketersPage.testimonial2Text: The tools they provide make work so much easier. I can track everything from my phone and commissions arrive quickly.
marketersPage.faq1Q: How long does account activation take?
marketersPage.faq1A: Your account is activated immediately after registration and identity verification.
marketersPage.faq2Q: When do I receive my commission?
marketersPage.faq2A: Commissions are transferred weekly every Sunday to your bank account.
marketersPage.faq3Q: Do I need prior marketing experience?
marketersPage.faq3A: No, we provide complete training and ready templates to help you start even without experience.
marketersPage.faq4Q: Is there a maximum commission limit?
marketersPage.faq4A: No limit — the more clients you bring, the higher your commission and tier.
marketersPage.faq5A: Yes, the program is available to all marketers in Saudi Arabia and the Gulf region.
marketersPage.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Journey with Dealix?
marketersPage.formSuccess: Registered successfully! We'll contact you soon.
